gt_sql: SELECT T1.name FROM cards AS T1 INNER JOIN sets AS T2 ON T2.code = T1.setCode WHERE T2.name = 'Coldsnap' ORDER BY T1.convertedManaCost DESC LIMIT 1
pred_sql: SELECT name FROM cards WHERE setCode = 'CSP' ORDER BY convertedManaCost DESC LIMIT 1;
question: Please list the name of the cards in the set Coldsnap with the highest converted mana cost.
